title: Petface (Toyz by Petface) Twist Tugger Dog Toy, Blue/Green/Pink (One Colour Supplied at Random)
features: TOUGH & DURABLE: Keep your furry friend entertained and active with this Petface Twist Tugger Dog Toy, promoting interactive play
INTERACTIVE PLAY: This toy promotes dental health by encouraging chewing and play, making it safe and colourful for your pet
FEATURES: A tough, durable design in blue/green/pink; one colour supplied at random - perfect for fun tug-of-war games with your pet
SAFE CHOICE: Made from high-quality materials to ensure the safety of your beloved pet during playtime. Ideal for bonding and keeping them engaged

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird for great, affordable products! Petface Toyz Twist Tugger This solid rubber dog tugger toy will give your pet hours of fun and helps to keep them fit and healthy. This tugger is chewable, bouncy, buoyant, durable and brilliant fun. featuring bright, attractive colours for extra entertainment. Measures 28 cm length by 9 cm width. One toy supplied of which the colour is selected at random. ABOUT PETFACE All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. TREAT YOUR PAMPERED POOCH! Treat your pampered pooch to this Twist Tugger toy, perfect for tugging games. This fun toy helps to develop your pet's sense of play and exercise, helping them to stay fit and healthy. YOUR DOG'S BEST FRIEND! Ideal for interactive play indoors or outdoors, the Toyz Twist Tugger Dog Toy is great for throw and fetch or for keeping your dog amused when left to their own devices.
